title: Add pdf to .readthedocs.yml?
body:
### Feature request description

It would be nice to add `- pdf` format to `.readthedocs.yml` for available document types for offline viewing of Podman documentation.

See:
- https://docs.readthedocs.io/en/stable/downloadable-documentation.html
- https://github.com/jax-ml/jax/pull/9869/files

 


### Suggest potential solution

Facilitates offline reading and other uses of documentation.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: Sure open a PR. AFAIK this used to just work and you could select other version on the docs site by default but I guess that got lost when it was migrated to the new config file?
@Luap99 nice that you added that, but I do not see the PDF as being complete yet for some reason: https://docs.podman.io/_/downloads/en/latest/pdf/
I don't know how read the docs generates that and I don't have time to deal with it. If you know how this works and if podman is doing anything wrong let us know.
Interestingly I just looked at the epub and this seems to have all the man pages in there
